final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing technical infographic for a Sony A7 camera exploded-view diagram.

Style/medium: clean technical illustration, exploded-view diagram style, instructional manual aesthetic, vector-based with precise linework
Composition: centered camera body with parts radiating outward in an organized exploded arrangement, labels pointing to each component, isometric perspective
Subject: Sony A7 camera disassembled into core components — lens mount, sensor unit, shutter mechanism, battery compartment, memory card slot, viewfinder assembly, rear LCD screen, main circuit board, grip, hot shoe mount
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light gray gradient background, minimal grid lines for technical reference
Lighting/mood: even diffused studio lighting, neutral and clinical, designed for clarity and educational readability
Color palette: metallic silver and black for camera parts, bold accent colors for callout labels, high contrast text
Text (verbatim): "Sony A7"
Constraints: must be clearly readable at small sizes; all labels must be legible; exploded view must show logical assembly order
Avoid: photorealistic textures; cluttered overlapping parts; illegible small text; 3D render noise; watermarks
